title: Infinite Reforged
description: Explore, Create, Conquer! A reforge of a 1.12.2 modpack I created with my friends
body:
### ![The Main text of Infinite Reforged](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ae29470cf162511a35c863fa411b2fbe0ed2d571.png)  

⚠️ **Currently in Alpha – Expect Bugs & Changes!**  
Infinite Reforged is still in development. Features and mods may change as we improve the experience. Your feedback helps!  

---

Infinite Reforged is an updated version of the **Infinite Frontiers** modpack, now made for **Minecraft 1.21.1** with **NeoForge**. It includes a selected set of mods for **technology, magic, exploration, and automation** while improving performance and stability.  

### **Features**  

- **Technology & Automation** – Use **Tech Reborn** and other mods to build machines, automate tasks, and manage energy.  
- **Exploration & Adventure** – Discover new biomes, dungeons, and dimensions with unique challenges and rewards.  
- **Magic & Spells** – Unlock magical abilities, perform rituals, and explore arcane powers.  
- **Multiplayer Support** – Play solo or with friends on a server.  
- **Optimized Performance** – Designed for better stability and smoother gameplay.  

Whether you want to **build, explore, master magic, or create factories**, Infinite Reforged allows hours of playtime. 

### **Minimum Client Requirements**  
- **RAM**: 6GB (8GB recommended)

For a smoother experience, **8GB+ of RAM** is recommended.
